dtsPropsFor.MagneticNavLink: href: string; children: string; style?: React.CSSProperties;
dtsPropsFor.BookingLink: children?: React.ReactNode; label?: string; showPlus?: boolean; className?: string; style?: React.CSSProperties; /** link = underlined headline; primary/outline = button CTAs; ghost = minimal */ variant?: 'link' | 'primary' | 'outline' | 'ghost'; placement?: 'bottom-start' | 'bottom-end' | 'top-end'; onNavigate?: () => void; onMouseEnter?: React.MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>; onMouseLeave?: React.MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>;

libOverrides.bundle.mjs: stub next/link, next/navigation (usePathname/useRouter/useSearchParams), and next/image with plain DOM equivalents — the preview bundle has no mounted Next.js app router, so the real modules throw; also define process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CONTACT_EMAIL/LINKEDIN_URL/BOOKING_URL (referenced at module scope in lib/contact.ts and lib/booking.ts) since `process` isn't a browser global

buildCmd: pnpm run build && mkdir -p .design-sync/.cache/next-css/chunks .design-sync/.cache/next-css/media && cp "$(ls -t .next/static/chunks/*.css | head -1)" .design-sync/.cache/next-css/chunks/compiled.css && cp .next/static/media/*.woff2 .design-sync/.cache/next-css/media/
